ItacPersonItem.Notes: Secretary of the Incamminati, in close relationship with both Agostino Carracci, and Melchiorre Zoppio. Faberi`s funeral oration is the first biography of Agostino Carracci. See the entry on Faberi, by M. S. Campanini, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
